use_cases: Displaying travel destinations with immersive 3D hover effects
Showcasing featured products with interactive perspective shifts
Creating engaging gallery cards that respond to mouse movement
Building travel booking interfaces with premium interactive feel
Designing product showcases with depth and dimension
ai_summary: An interactive travel card component featuring a 3D tilt effect that responds to mouse movement with smooth spring animations. The card includes a background image, title, subtitle, and call-to-action button, creating an immersive browsing experience for travel destinations or featured products. Built with Framer Motion for performant animations and responsive across devices.
